response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with roughly 15 years of software development, including strong recent TypeScript/Node.js product work, hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq, and demonstrated cloud/container skills (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes). A deep testing and software-craftsmanship background (TDD, test frameworks, workshops) aligns well with the role's quality expectations. The main gaps are no stated Nest.js experience, frontend history weighted toward Ember rather than React, and no Kotlin exposure — all learnable given the breadth shown.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent/MCP tooling work directly matching the stack
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, author of test frameworks, and trainer/workshop lead
Proven cloud and infrastructure skills (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD) plus polyglot background
concerns: No Nest.js experience mentioned, a core framework in the primary stack
React exposure appears limited; frontend history is dominated by Ember.js
No Kotlin experience and Python not listed among skills, both named in required skills

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and limited React depth
